title: Mysore Heat Wave
lead: Mysore is experiencing a critical heat wave with a Z-Score of +3.51. The city's temperature has reached extreme levels, scoring 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Mysore has resulted in a high CDD of 11.3 GG, indicating extremely hot days. 
 The relative humidity is at 45%, which is relatively low, but the low wind speed of 6.0 km/h is exacerbating the heat. 
 The HDD is at 0.0 GG, indicating no cold days, and the city is experiencing a severe heat wave.
conclusion: Implementation of heat wave mitigation measures is required immediately.
